input.question: We are a student engineering team designing a vehicle for the FSAE competition. Attached is the FSAE rules document. What does rule IC.9.4.1 state exactly? Answer with only the text of the rule and no other words.

retrieved_context:
RULE: ic.9.4.1
            TITLE: configuration - the cockpit main switch must:

            CONTENT:
            rule IC.9.4.1: Configuration - The Cockpit Main Switch must:
IC.9.4.1 Configuration - The Cockpit Main Switch must:  
a. Be a push-pull or push-rotate emergency switch (pushing the button is the OFF position) 
b. Have a diameter of 24 mm minimum

final_answer: IC.9.4.1 Configuration - The Cockpit Main Switch must: a. Be a push-pull or push-rotate emergency switch (pushing the button is the OFF position) b. Have a diameter of 24 mm minimum
